chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-32 of 2025 Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-33 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No. 44/ 2025. 3. For order on M.A No. 412/ 2025. 4. For order on main case. 20-11-2025. Mr. Shoukat Rai @ Shoukat Sindhi advocate for applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G a/w SIP of PS Mithi. = Learned counsel for the applicant does not press these Criminal Miscellaneous applications on the ground that learned trial court has decided case on merit. In view of above, these Criminal Miscellaneous applications alongwith listed applications are dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE *Saleem*
